name: Maven Central
description: Maven Central — Sonatype's canonical repository for JVM libraries; the primary source for Maven and Gradle dependencies.

seo.title: Maven Central — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Maven Central: Maven Central — Sonatype's canonical repository for JVM libraries; the primary source for Maven and Gradle dependencies.

when_to_use: Publish JVM library artifacts to the canonical Maven repo
Fetch dependencies for Gradle and Maven build pipelines
GPG-signed artifact publishing for trust and security
Version management and transitive dependency resolution

pros: Canonical source of truth for JVM libraries
Free publishing via Sonatype OSSRH or Central Portal
cons: Publishing workflow is famously painful to set up first time
Immutable: one bad release is forever
OSSRH migration has been a multi-year saga
review.verdict: The only real option for public JVM libs; painful to onboard, reliable once you're in.
review.best_for: Java/Kotlin/Scala library authors publishing for the broader ecosystem.
review.not_for: Private internal artifacts — use a private Nexus or Artifactory instead.
